summary: Comprehensive testing of DJ Tool App completed. Backend: 20/22 tests passed (90.9%). Frontend: All 5 tabs functional, navigation working, interactive features operational. AI endpoint slow (34s response time) causing 2 test timeouts.

minor.issue: AI endpoint takes 34+ seconds to respond, causing timeouts with 30s limit. OpenRouter z-ai/glm-5.1 model is slow but functional.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - Raw text not wrapped in Text component
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - Should update to use style prop
Console warning: 'useNativeDriver not supported' - Expected in web preview, not an issue for native apps

action_items: Consider increasing AI endpoint timeout to 60 seconds or add loading state with progress indicator
Fix text node warning in AI Mix screen - wrap loose text in Text component
Update deprecated pointerEvents prop usage to style.pointerEvents
Add testID attributes to interactive elements for better testing (currently missing)
critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id exclusion: ✓ Working correctly - no _id in API responses
Environment variables: ✓ All URLs from env vars, no hardcoding
API prefix: ✓ All routes properly prefixed with /api
React Native components: ✓ Using View, Text, TouchableOpacity correctly
Psytrance in BPM reference: ✓ Correctly shows 'Psytrance 140-150' instead of Trance
OpenRouter model: ✓ Using z-ai/glm-5.1 as specified
Camelot wheel: ✓ All 24 keys present and functional
PDF export: ✓ Working, returns valid PDF with 200 status
DJ Tips: ✓ All 7 categories including psytrance_specific with 4 tips
Missing testID attributes: ⚠ Interactive elements lack testID for robust testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All tabs load, navigation works, interactive features functional)

seed_data_verification.tracks: ✓ 1 track found: 'Strobe by Deadmau5' with key 8A and 128 BPM
seed_data_verification.setlists: ✓ 1 setlist found: 'Friday Night Set' at Club XYZ

features_tested.tab_navigation: ✓ All 5 tabs (BPM, Keys, Setlists, AI Mix, Practice) load and navigate correctly
features_tested.bpm_detector: ✓ Tap tempo working (detected 115 BPM from 5 taps), manual BPM adjuster functional, waveform animation present, Psytrance shown in reference
features_tested.keys_harmonic_mixing: ✓ Camelot wheel renders all 24 keys, key selection shows compatible keys (8A → 7A, 9A, 8B), track library displays seed data, add track modal opens
features_tested.setlists: ✓ Setlist cards display, detail modal opens, shows track count, library stats accurate (1 track, 1 setlist, 1 with keys), create/add/export buttons present
features_tested.ai_recommendations: ✓ All inputs present (key selector, BPM input, energy dots 1-10, mood chips, context field), API functional but slow (34s response)
features_tested.practice_timer: ✓ Timer display, crossfader visualization with A/B decks, start/stop session buttons, crossfade counter, stats cards showing total time/sessions/crossfades
features_tested.dj_tips: ✓ All 8 category filters present (All Tips, Beatmatching, Harmonic, Transitions, Energy, Technical, Prep, Psytrance), tips load per category, psytrance_specific API returns 4 tips
features_tested.pdf_export: ✓ Endpoint returns valid PDF with 200 status, includes setlist details and tracks table
features_tested.audio_import: ✓ Import button present in Keys tab, modal structure exists

api_endpoints_tested.tracks_crud: ✓ POST/GET/PUT/DELETE all working, data persists correctly
api_endpoints_tested.setlists_crud: ✓ POST/GET/PUT/DELETE all working, track_ids array functional
api_endpoints_tested.ai_recommendations: ⚠ POST /api/ai/recommendations works but takes 34+ seconds (timeout issue)
api_endpoints_tested.practice_sessions: ✓ POST/GET /api/practice working, stats endpoint returns correct aggregations
api_endpoints_tested.tips_all: ✓ GET /api/tips returns all categories including psytrance_specific

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Only issue is AI endpoint slowness (34s response time) which is an OpenRouter API limitation, not a code bug. All CRUD operations, navigation, and interactive features work correctly. Seed data is present and displays properly. Consider adding testID attributes for better automated testing in future iterations.
